75996.subject: Fwd: Zmena neplánovaných zmien - 2. augusta sa nevyrába !
75996.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
Від: 'Attila Ambruz' via KSC_AGA _LineLeaders <
ksc_aga_lineleaders@nmb-minebea.com>
Date: ср, 15 лип. 2026 р. о 16:28
Subject: Zmena neplánovaných zmien - 2. augusta sa nevyrába !
To: Kosice AGA Line Leaders <ksc_aga_lineleaders@nmb-minebea.com>


Ahojte,

*"Ahojte, *

*na základe info od CTParku s Vami zdieľam info o plánovanom prerušení
dodávky elektrickej energie v termíne,*



   - *2. augusta v čase od 7:30 h do 16:00 h / nedeľa*

* z dôvodu plánovanej rekonštrukcie zariadení distribučnej spoločnosti.*


*Chcem Vás preto požiadať, aby ste v danom termíne /  sobotnú rannú smenu v
kw 31 neplánovali výrobu a povypínali relevantné technológie v predstihu."*

*Info sme dostali teraz.*


*2. augusta sa teda nevyrába a bude neplánovaná zmena. Informujte aj
operátorov* (zároveň to budem prezentovať na mesačnom meetingu).


Ďakujem.



S pozdravom,

Kind regards,


ATTILA AMBRUZ
Production Coordinator - EMT Automotive


[image: MinebeaMitsumi-Logo]

Minebea Slovakia s.r.o.

K letisku 1637

040 17 Kosice

Phone: +421 902 922 933

E-Mail: *attila.ambruz@ <patrik.lukacs@nmb-minebea.com>**minebeamitsumi.eu
<http://minebeamitsumi.eu/>*


-- 

*Ďakujem,*

*S pozdravom, *

*Kind regards,*


*Oleh Novosadov*

*Line Leader*

[image: MinebeaMitsumi-Logo]

Minebea Slovakia s.r.o.

K letisku 1637

040 17 Kosice


E-Mail: oleg.novosadov@nmb-minebea.com

Follow us on

[image: Homepage] <https://www.minebeamitsumi.eu/>[image: Facebook]
<https://www.facebook.com/MinebeaMitsumiTechnologyCenter/>[image: Xing]
<https://www.xing.com/pages/minebeamitsumitechnologycentereuropegmbh>[image:
LinkedIn]
<https://www.linkedin.com/company/minebeamitsumi?originalSubdomain=de>[image:
YouTube] <https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCik81FV7MitwRbasG6APkBw/featured>[image:
Instagram] <https://www.instagram.com/minebeamitsumi_tech_center/?hl=de>
*Tento e-mail môže obsahovať dôverné a/alebo privilegované informácie. Ak
nie ste zamýšľaným príjemcom (alebo ste tento e-mail dostali omylom),
okamžite o tom informujte odosielateľa a trvalo vymažte tento e-mail.
Akékoľvek neoprávnené kopírovanie, zverejňovanie alebo distribúcia
materiálu v tomto e-maile je prísne zakázaná.*
*This e-mail may contain confidential and/or privileged information. If you
are not the intended recipient (or have received this e-mail in error),
please notify the sender immediately and permanently delete this e-mail.
Any unauthorized copying, disclosure or distribution of the material in
this e-mail is strictly prohibited.*

75958.subject: Delivery Status Notification (Delay)
75958.body:
** Ще не доставлено **

Виникла тимчасова проблема з доставкою вашого повідомлення одержувачу noreply@olehruslanawwedding.abacusai.app. Gmail повторюватиме спроби протягом 20 год. Якщо доставити не вдасться, ви отримаєте сповіщення.

Докладніше: https://support.google.com/mail/answer/7720

Відповідь була така:

The recipient server did not accept our requests to connect. For more information, go to https://support.google.com/mail/answer/7720

75949.subject: 10 years of MetaMask. Reveal your onchain stats and persona
75949.body:
A decade of redefining money — and a personalized look back at your onchain life.

View in browser (https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMxg5m_5PW7Y9pgv6lZ3m1W5KkRMz2c9QyzW5TXV3j3hd4rJW6XL4dN1LHxslW7FFmv-817JlJW4yRVRN2YVz5MW74LFMH8mFbscW1Pc9ZB5nW-mnW7XBmqf7s395kW66cV4M6C3gdpW2DFvTh2j2ty6W6r-plW5LJVTMW3TJ27b2YvnJdW2HBcM86-cmWVW42P9Qn6-xzxJW48szQX4QWVVBW3q-f1q669g7bVTd-Nc8XHmrTW7YTb8c3MYFmXW1NHDZY5j5h13W50whk94fJfwPW8HLpx-2WM-ZYW1FdnhM7XzSP1W4Nz7q-18X-nwW3kZfQD67Hm3sW6nMd1s63MjDmN72y0HhZ424sW37hq5H5fNbVbW1L35M17Y0CJzW6s6ZCh4WWH_dW5Xy-Gr17Bhh0W1v2b848jdc6NW5rDXWb8PFTXmW4Rt_w05Y5Q8VW3WLJY17NNYhHW74Hy9L7dFKSVW27mRSs2khnpxW3xC6329hcbZwW4qzZ4z4G0cbmW7CbsnS5CC1x8W5gPXp73LxfMbW428GkQ6trj_VW73F1mn3c7pW5f6Vpmzs04 )

MetaMask (https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMwH3prCCW6N1vHY6lZ3l5W2VStbT8pXP50W63FKYK3ddMtFW72Qy6t5TrB-gW4R55pc13pwH-W4DHBkj26GYQqW64NrVm3mpDC8N8pcLvyN_XKvW8_Qy6p7GCB6MN3dlR6-_xhsRN5JgyZbXtDrPW5kb0xj1HbwkvW70bm8F4xTXSlN7gZWBywH6lwW3_Lz7H8ycwWdW6tjyzR1YCd4qV-6_J43kw0GnW2LWMyp2bPBQVN6BF3pt_0NyfW3x1RzD2l6-1tW79sYkX93VLTSW39Wts83jN_qWW1WnSTM2-NczPf5jF7bs04 )

A decade of MetaMask

On July 14, 2016, MetaMask went live: one small browser extension, built on the bet that people should be able to hold and use their money directly. 

Ten years later: Millions of downloads, used in nearly every country on Earth, trillions of dollars moved. Every transaction signed by someone like you. 

We didn't get here alone. Whether you joined in the ICO days, DeFi Summer, the NFT boom, or last week, this milestone is yours too. 

So we made a little something for you: a tour of your history onchain, alongside ours. Just open up MetaMask to try it out. (Best experienced on mobile.)

See your life onchain
(https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMwn3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3m9W4QRvtF6fC7tTVLWPzm466gtvW40sL3Q8VzYV7W3bSCTg4zfzG3W97VglV4cj750W49MW8l7G7Qj5W5fRJDj24RBrWW6FKpst2sJZZ9W293pfv52JdWdW8kqkZK7b-kGZW5wxfRg8sWgb_W394SFb9fz4H5W8LVW_j10qxMgN2tkqnc5HpBzV43vrs8YxpZzW8hP1D_7PwYsnW2XPdT38swQ8HN36wR_D8ltlmW7GNfsB9dn3clW2zQDmZ3DKtc7f7JpZh204 )

See your life onchain
(https://newsletter.consensys.io/e3t/Ctc/T8+113/czspy04/VVGQ--4zLLPTW30Vv2H1KJjB5W2dmkKk5RtC2BN2dmMwn5fkwKW69t95C6lZ3pDW5Qh5Pz2gMZVwN5G_GzsWrT13Vrsmlc4HNjyZW5v18B37hK5b9W7jQF-L5bhwc_W2D5x4P1hqd_QVM-4vB7PWjVYW63JMFP52Bj_cW6JM-tS9c9GGKW7v4TG21Vq5rMW1tDp-X5xBZ14W4tSMR-67rD0YW2p8BJr5w1tFlW6C-BHk6KGZ--VTc6pb5nHQq1W98PgHb8zpJ0lW2DZcnx5J2ZPzW1GRQyB7FY844W8YgKMt1VwFfkW8_ccRq36zHPPVWvzGN4ttHs5W62CX-h3BGPH9W5ZddKJ8vk3N3N2LVg3TR0pJ9W4Y2GzV6xJ_tSW4Nlx_h354VS1W1xSDHH8VSXMqW6t7qVM8PhkdpW2dFthY45GnJlW6zV6jY4BFS7KW5KRvs_8BV-GvW6DQSXp2bgrlHN63QBfpTMhhHW47xtRS19cV0HW8SJPKF1mDFKwN7wPPgb9GZrvf2HrXw204 )
